name: ELECTROLUX B ADR/2  SK 5
summary: ELECTROLUX B ADR/2 SK 5: Electrolux B manufactures and sells household appliances under brands like Electrolux, AEG, and Frigidaire through its ADR (American Depositary Receipt). Their products include refrigerators, ovens, washing machines, dishwashers, and vacuum cleaners. The parent company is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
